content: Kaha hai hm
Action: shell, Command: where, Message: Aapki current location bata rahe hain.
D:\ me jaao
Action: shell, Command: cd D:\, Message: D:\ me ja rahe hain.
Isme kitne folders hai dikho
Action: shell, Command: folders | count, Message: Folders count kar rahe hain.
Hello
Action: respond, Command: , Message: Hello there! How can I help you today?
Kitne commands available hai
Action: shell, Command: help, Message: Available commands ki list le rahe hain.
D drive me jaao
Action: respond, Command: , Message: {"action":"shell","command":"cd D:\","message":"D drive me ja rahe hain."}
D:\ me jaao
Action: respond, Command: , Message: {"action":"shell","command":"cd D:\","message":"D drive me ja rahe hain."}
Show all folders
Action: shell, Command: folders, Message: Saare folders dikha raha hu.
Okay delete xxx.txt
Action: shell, Command: delete confirm xxx.txt, Message: xxx.txt delete kar raha hu.
Create new file sanu.txt
Action: shell, Command: makefile sanu.txt, Message: Sanu.txt file create kar diya.
Write inside "Hello sanu sharma kya haal hai"
Action: code_write, Command: , Message: writing code
Write inside "Hello sanu sharma kya haal hai" in sanu.txt
Action: code_write, Command: , Message: writing code
